subject: F1000 Monthly Update - July 2014
body:
To ensure you receive emails from Faculty of 1000, add info@updates.f1000.com to your safelist.

-----------------------------------------------------

Faculty of 1000 |  http://f1000.com                
Monthly Update  |   July 2014 

-----------------------------------------------------

~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~    
 A big welcome to our new Heads of Faculty     
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~   
 
We are delighted to announce the appointment of five new Heads of Faculty and hope you will join us in welcoming them on board.


* Dan Mayer [ http://f1000.com/prime/thefaculty/member/499999771097538480 ], Albany Medical Center -- Research Methodology   
* Arnulf Stenzl [ http://f1000.com/prime/thefaculty/member/2074848406860993 ], University of Tübingen Medical School -- Urology   
* Hilary Critchley [ http://f1000.com/prime/thefaculty/member/1041847644638392 ], University of Edinburgh -- Women's Health  
* Paul M Stewart [ http://f1000.com/prime/thefaculty/member/1098801620860997 ], University of Leeds -- Diabetes & Endocrinology   
* Lars Eriksson [ http://f1000.com/prime/thefaculty/member/2980233441168882 ], Karolinska Institute and Karolinska University Hospital -- Anesthesiology   

 

   F1000Prime                                
==================

688 recommendations [ http://f1000pri.me/past30days ] added by our Faculty of 10,000+ Members in the past 30 days*. Below is a selection:


11 *   
Making room for new memories?      
[ http://f1000.com/prime/718378821?key=kpEt8v0VLCCsZ7P ]     
This paper establishes that adult hippocampal neurogenesis can be detrimental for newly generated memories, perhaps explaining infantile amnesia.    
Akers KG, Martinez-Canabal A, Restivo L et al. Science. 2014 May; 344:598-602    


7 *   
Aneuploidy via tetraploidy    
[ http://f1000.com/prime/718314290?key=hi9SGdfFWFJMuzC ]   
This exceptional study illustrates a novel cellular trajectory that underlies the rapid emergence of resistance to antimicrobial drugs conferred by aneuploidy.   
Harrison BD, Hashemi J, Bibi M et al. PLoS Biol. 2014 Mar; 12:e1001815   


4 *   
No pain, LIFE gain?    
[ http://f1000.com/prime/718415468?key=DZKnqL75AnpD4Co ]
An elegant study demonstrating that the loss of the pain ion channel TRPV1 leads to increased lifespan in both mice and worms.   
Riera CE, Huising MO, Follett P et al. Cell. 2014 May; 157(5):1023-36   

*Accurate at the time of writing.


 F1000Prime Reports
~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~ 

Open-access review journal [ http://f1000.com/prime/reports/ ], reporting on the hottest topics.

Advances in managing medulloblastoma and intracranial primitive neuro-ectodermal tumors   
[ http://f1000.com/prime/reports/m/6/56/ ]   
Entering an exciting new age of molecularly targeted treatment for both medulloblastoma and intracranial primitive neuro-ectodermal tumors.  
F1000Prime Report by Jenny Adamski [ http://f1000.com/prime/thefaculty/member/499999771097534406 ], Vijay Ramaswamy, and Eric Bouffet [ http://f1000.com/prime/thefaculty/member/1725582223121251 ].   
F1000Prime Rep 2014, 6:56  



 ---------------
 See all recent F1000Prime Reports          
 >> http://f1000.com/prime/reports/                 
 ---------------   
    

----------------------

  
~~~~~~~~~
 Last chance: submit a Data Note FREE with F1000Research  
 > http://f1000research.com/data-notes      
~~~~~~~~~

Until July 31 2014, submission of your first Data Note is free for datasets of up to 1GB. A Data Note is a formal publication with data and methods, but no analysis or conclusion. It ensures that your data remain discoverable, accessible and usable. Read more on our blog [ http://blog.f1000research.com/2014/05/06/give-your-data-a-new-lease-of-life/ ], or find out why other authors have deposited [ http://blog.f1000research.com/2014/06/18/sharing-research-data-with-a-data-note-an-interview-with-jurgen-bajorath/ ].   

    

   F1000Research                      
======================

Our innovative open access journal [ http://f1000research.com/ ] offering rapid publication, open peer review and open data.   

Below is a selection of our latest peer reviewed articles:   

RESEARCH ARTICLE   
Yeast Augmented Network Analysis (YANA): a new systems approach to identify therapeutic targets for human genetic diseases [ http://f1000research.com/articles/3-121/v1 ] [v1; ref status: indexed, http://f1000r.es/3gk ]   
Published: 02 Jun 2014   
Wiley DJ, Juan I, Le H et al.   
F1000Research 2014, 3:121   

RESEARCH ARTICLE   
Vitellogenin family gene expression does not increase Drosophila lifespan or fecundity [ http://f1000research.com/articles/3-125/v1 ] [v2; ref status: indexed, http://f1000r.es/3ac ]   
Published: 10 Jun 2014   
Ren Y and Hughes KA.   
F1000Research 2014, 3:125   

RESEARCH ARTICLE   
Chewing through the Miocene: an examination of the feeding musculature in the ground sloth Hapalops from South America (Mammalia: Pilosa) [ http://f1000research.com/articles/3-86/v1 ] [v1; ref status: indexed, http://f1000r.es/2pu ]   
Published: 04 Apr 2014   
Naples VL and McAfee RK.   
F1000Research 2014, 3:86   

~~~~~~~~~   
 Cytoscape App article collection   
~~~~~~~~~  

We launched the Cytoscape App article collection [ http://f1000research.com/article-collections/cytoscapeapps ] with Guest Editor Alex Pico. Cytoscape is an open source software platform for network visualization. Through the development of Cytoscape apps, the platform can be targeted to any research area. The collection contains articles about the apps. Find out more in this interview with Alex Pico [ http://blog.f1000research.com/2014/07/01/theres-an-app-for-that-interview-with-alex-pico/ ].

F1000Research article collections [ http://f1000research.com/article-collections ] can be set up for any community, organization, society or conference, and can be updated with new articles over time. We will be launching several other article collections over the next few months, in various areas of the life sciences.


 ---------------------------------------------
  Submit now to F1000Research          
  >> http://f1000research.com/author/submit        
 ----------------------------------------------
 
  
 
    F1000Posters                 
======================
 
Open Repository [ http://f1000.com/posters ] for posters and slide presentations; completely free to view and submit. Below are a few selections:

* DEVELOPMENTAL BIOLOGY *     

A centralized smart platform for open sharing of iPS cell information.    
[ http://f1000.com/posters/browse/summary/1095961 ]   
Pearse R, Bourges-Waldegg D, Napolitano C et al.  
F1000Posters 2014, 5:707     


* MICROBIOLOGY *  

Bacteriophages and the ecology of anthrax.   
[ http://f1000.com/posters/browse/summary/1095784 ]   
Ganz H, Law C.   
F1000Posters 2014, 5:661   

 
 ----------------------------------------------
  Deposit now        
  >> http://f1000.com/posters/fordepositors      
 ---------------------------------------------- 


----------------------
 
 * Follow us on Twitter * 
  
@F1000 [ http://twitter.com/f1000 ]  
@F1000Research [ http://twitter.com/f1000research ]     
@F1000Posters [ http://twitter.com/f1000posters ]  
 
 
 * 'Like' us on Facebook * 
  
F1000Prime [ https://www.facebook.com/F1000 ]   
F1000Research [ https://www.facebook.com/F1000Research ]   
F1000Posters [ https://www.facebook.com/F1000Posters ]  
 
 
 * Connect with us on LinkedIn *  
  
Faculty of 1000 [ https://www.linkedin.com/groups?mostRecent=&gid=1971657 ]   
F1000Research [ https://www.linkedin.com/groups?home=&gid=4267793 ]  
F1000 Specialists [ https://www.linkedin.com/groups?mostRecent=&gid=8123808 ]  
 
 
 * Follow our blogs * 
  
F1000Prime Blog [ http://blog.f1000.com/ ]
F1000Research Blog [ http://blog.f1000research.com/ ]
 
 
----------------------


-----------------------------------------------------   

In addition to this Monthly Update, we also send out emails featuring deals and discounts for registered users. To sign up, registered users should visit MyF1000 via any F1000 product and opt-in to receive "Information from F1000 about special offers" (under Email Alerts).

You have received this message because you asked to receive the F1000 Monthly Update to your registered email address from Faculty of 1000. If you do not wish to receive any further such messages, you may unsubscribe [ http://www.f1000.com/unsubscribe/email?email=jeeproject@yahoo.com&emailAlertType=MONTHLY_UPDATES ] at any time. For further information or enquiries please contact Customer Services at info@f1000.com [ mailto:info@f1000.com ].

Faculty of 1000 Ltd | Science Navigation Group  
Registered in England and Wales with Company Number 3739756     
Middlesex House, 34-42 Cleveland Street | London, W1T 4LB | United Kingdom
